com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs

Class AbstractNativeMap<T extends PStruct>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<PStructArray<T>,PStructWriter<T>>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeMap<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    PMap, PStructMap

    public abstract class AbstractNativeMap<T extends PStruct>
extends AbstractNativeCollection<PStructArray<T>,PStructWriter<T>>
    The struct-entry hash engine behind the maps: open addressing over a keyed layout with a reserved zero-key slot.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clear()
      Empties the map.
      boolean containsKey(double key)
      Tests whether key is present.
      boolean containsKey(long key)
      Tests whether key is present.
      StructLayout layout() 
      boolean remove(double key)
      Removes the mapping for key.
      boolean remove(long key)
      Removes the mapping for key.
      void trim()
      Shrinks the table to the smallest size fitting the current mappings.
